name: IRS Submission Error Rate - {{ENV_LABEL}} - warn
description: IRS submission rejection rate exceeds 10% in the last 15 minutes
query: SELECT if(count() >= 5, countIf(status_code = 2) * 100.0 / count(), 0) AS value FROM spans WHERE service_name = '{{SERVICE_NAME_PATTERN}}' AND operation_name LIKE '%irs/submit%' AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE

name: IRS Submission Error Rate - {{ENV_LABEL}} - critical
description: IRS submission rejection rate exceeds 50% in the last 15 minutes
query: SELECT if(count() >= 5, countIf(status_code = 2) * 100.0 / count(), 0) AS value FROM spans WHERE service_name = '{{SERVICE_NAME_PATTERN}}' AND operation_name LIKE '%irs/submit%' AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE

name: Payment Failure Rate - {{ENV_LABEL}} - warn
description: Payment failure rate exceeds 5% in the last 30 minutes
query: SELECT if(count() >= 3, countIf(status_code = 2) * 100.0 / count(), 0) AS value FROM spans WHERE service_name = '{{SERVICE_NAME_PATTERN}}' AND operation_name LIKE '%payments/checkout%' AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 30 MINUTE

name: Auth Error Rate - {{ENV_LABEL}} - warn
description: Authentication error rate exceeds 20% in the last 15 minutes
query: SELECT if(count() >= 10, countIf(status_code = 2) * 100.0 / count(), 0) AS value FROM spans WHERE service_name = '{{SERVICE_NAME_PATTERN}}' AND operation_name LIKE '%auth/%' AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE

name: API Latency p95 - {{ENV_LABEL}} - warn
query: SELECT quantile(0.95)(duration_us / 1000.0) AS value FROM spans WHERE service_name = '{{SERVICE_NAME_PATTERN}}' AND parent_span_id = '' AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE

name: API Latency p95 - {{ENV_LABEL}} - critical
query: SELECT quantile(0.95)(duration_us / 1000.0) AS value FROM spans WHERE service_name = '{{SERVICE_NAME_PATTERN}}' AND parent_span_id = '' AND timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE
